scripts.lint:scripts: node --check background.js && node --check content.js && node --check popup.js && node --check scripts/build.js && node --check scripts/bump-version.js && node --check scripts/check-sites.js && node --check scripts/publish-chrome.js && node --check scripts/setup-chrome-oauth-server.js && node --check scripts/setup-firefox-secrets-server.js
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint:scripts && npm run lint:sites && npm run lint:firefox
scripts.publish:firefox: web-ext sign --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir dist/firefox-signed --channel listed --amo-metadata amo-metadata.json --approval-timeout 0
